programme.title: E37 - The Adventure
programme.desc: Princesses, horses and magic wands. Bluey and Chloe can play any role they want, when they embark on an adventure to save their playground kingdom from the Greedy Queen.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E17 - Copy The King
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E12 - Diesel Glows Away
programme.desc: When notorious Diesel hides from the other engines, his plans backfire and he gets a surprise on Sodor.

programme.title: E13 - Laid Back Shane
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: E38 - Great Mosque Of Djenne, Africa
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: E39 - Wimbledon, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are at Centre Court in Wimbledon to watch the world's most famous tennis tournament.

programme.title: E40 - Cave Of Crystals, Mexico
programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: E13 - Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: E13 - The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E312 - The Big Ant-Venture
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are on Animal Island when they discover a world of tiny creatures right under their tires: Insect City! The friends transform into a super-strong ant and a bouncy grasshopper for their littlest big adventure yet!

programme.title: E423 - Pups Save Luke Stars / Pups Save Chicken Day
programme.desc: Katie is going to perform her contest-winning song with Luke Stars! But Luke Stars gets stuck on a mountain ledge on his way to Adventure Bay. // Chickaletta goes missing on Chicken Day! The PAW Patrol have to find her to save the festivites.

programme.title: E207 - The Crew Builds Charger A Super Bed / The Crew Builds A Super Squirrely Whi
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: E222 - The Crew Builds A Hotel
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it.

programme.title: E806 - Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.title: E509 - The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship!

programme.title: E526 - Pups Save A Tower Of Pizza
programme.desc: Adventure Bay is working hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas!

programme.title: E206 - The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: E303 - The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: E103 - Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E407 - The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: E244 - The Toy Cupboard
programme.desc: Peppa and George's toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys. Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard, but it needs to be assembled – and Mummy and Daddy Pig are not good at DIY.

programme.title: E242 - Granny And Granpa's Attic
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but it's hard to decide what to throw out. Amongst the clutter, Peppa finds an old record player and some funny old records.

programme.title: E103 - Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E101 - The Mystery On The Monsoon Express
programme.desc: Animal detectives Sam and Kit collect all the clues while searching for the slithering suspect who bit an express train's engineer.

programme.title: E825 - Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Molly Mole and Freddy Fox dig a huge tunnel and find a box of pirate treasure. The treasure has gone missing - something mysterious is going on!

programme.title: E827 - Valentine's Day
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Daddy Pig gives Mummy Pig a card but Where's Daddy Pig's card from Mummy? Mummy Pig had put it in the post, but it hasn't arrived yet. Will Daddy Pig get a card?

programme.title: E829 - Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends come to school early to have breakfast together. At the breakfast club, they learn about how food gives you energy and talk about their favourite breakfast foods.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

E1
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: A villain’s plans to steal the moon are foiled when he encounters the immense will of three little orphaned girls who look at him as a potential Dad.

programme.title: E1 - Sick Day
programme.desc: Adam stays home sick from school one day. Jake is so distraught over the absence of his best pal.

programme.title: E5 - The Spiffanos
programme.desc: After Adam borrows a pencil from Phinneas Porpoise, he finds himself indebted to the Spiffies. To pay back the debt, Adam agrees to make a secret 'delivery', but Jake tags along, and things quickly go south.

programme.title: E13 - Flesh Fur Fantasy
programme.desc: Adam gets a day job as a used car lot costumed gorilla, offending his friends in the process.

programme.title: E15 - Don'T Noc It 'Til You Try It
programme.desc: Slips oversleeps during class and gets trapped in night school.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: E4 - Jam Session Jam-Up
programme.desc: Tamir and Gabrielle’s family is helping put on the Sesame Street Jazz Festival and everyone is taking part in it.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: E4 - The Titan Games Trials 4
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: An original sci-fi drama based on Ogawa Satoshi's novel, scripted by Yoshida Reiko. In 2125, Mars hosts 100,000 settlers under ISDA's control, as tension brews between authority and freedom. Lili-E1102 (Suri Lin), a visually impaired woman born on Mars, endures harsh training to reach Earth-for one reason: to meet Shiraishi Aoto (Suda Masaki), a young ISDA officer, and honor a secret promise. But when a catastrophic event derails her mission, it sparks a chain of schemes between Mars and Earth-leading to consequences far greater than anyone imagined.

programme.desc: The story begins in 1894, when Baron Pierre de Courbetin announces his intention to stage the first Olympic games of the Modern Era within two years in Athens.

programme.title: E2 - Part 2

programme.desc: In December 2021, an out of season long-track tornado travels across Western Kentucky in the dead of night leaving a trail of destruction.

programme.title: E10 - Southern Discomfort
programme.desc: An inner-city youth mentor, who is scared of the wild, joins Bear Grylls for an adventure outside his comfort zone. Brandon’s mission is to face his fears and inspire kids in his community.

programme.title: E3 - Alligator & Yaupon Tea
programme.desc: Daniel heads out on a South Carolina gator hunt and then learns about an ancient American caffeine crop called Yaupon being rediscovered in Georgia.

programme.title: E5 - David Walliams

programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.title: E7 - Shaquille O'Neil
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps
programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertaken by European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840’s, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, in the very interior of the country.

programme.title: E17 - Killer Instinct
programme.desc: After NCIS captures the hitman known as 'The Poet,' the team races to uncover who ordered the assassination of a Navy Chief.

programme.title: E18 - After The Storm
programme.desc: When a trio of combat vets are found murdered in a D.C. motel room, NCIS tracks down a suspect who refuses to talk to anyone but Sam Hanna.

programme.title: E19 - Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: McGee's career and credibility are on the line when he investigates the deputy director for corruption. Also, Torres and Knight receive some surprising news.

programme.title: E1 - Empty Nest
programme.desc: NCIS searches for a missing undercover agent in the midst of an active hostage situation.

programme.title: E4 - Sticks & Stones
programme.desc: After receiving intelligence on deadly threats to multiple locations that could lead to a catastrophic war, NCIS is called in to try to neutralize the danger.

programme.title: E6 - Knight And Day
programme.desc: Things become tense when Knight is assigned to protect his wife after the home of a high-level defense contractor is attacked.

programme.title: E8 - Out Of Control
programme.desc: NCIS investigates a murder related to a car that begins driving on its own.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: Lured Into War: Russia's Foreign Fighters In Ukraine
programme.desc: Russia is using foreign fighters in its war against Ukraine. Often, they are from poorer countries in Africa, Asia, and Latin America.

programme.title: How Antoni Gaudi Shaped Barcelona
programme.desc: Gaudi's Sagrada Familia is one of Barcelona's defining landmarks. Plus: Germany's largest Hindu temple, and Poland's favorite comfort food, bigos.

programme.title: Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.desc: Russia is using foreign fighters in its war against Ukraine. Often, they are from poorer countries in Africa, Asia, and Latin America.

Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Can Ghana's Black Stars Deliver At The World Cup?
programme.desc: Ghana's national team has shown worrying signs in recent international friendlies, with many pointing to inconsistent and chaotic preparations. But with World Cup 2026 approaching and Africa set to send an expanded group of 10 teams to the global stage, the stakes have never been higher. Are Ghana's Black Stars ready to rise, or heading into another storm?

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: The Chinese Dream - 24 Hours In Young China - Episode 1: A Day With Paintbo
programme.desc: What do young Chinese people dream of? What hopes and goals do they have? Do the grandchildren of the 'rising generation” still believe in progress through work, and prosperity for all? Or do they have different values?

programme.title: Flamenco, Perestroika And Mishpocha
programme.desc: The meteoric rise of genre-busting pop icon Rosalia. The collapse of the Soviet Union as told through detailed eyewitness accounts. And: Beastie Boys founder Mike D's tribute to 'mishpocha.'

programme.title: Can Ghana's Black Stars Deliver At The World Cup?
programme.desc: Ghana's national team has shown worrying signs in recent international friendlies, with many pointing to inconsistent and chaotic preparations. But with World Cup 2026 approaching and Africa set to send an expanded group of 10 teams to the global stage, the stakes have never been higher. Are Ghana's Black Stars ready to rise, or heading into another storm?

programme.title: The US Turns It Back On Electric Vehicles
programme.desc: US carmakers pivot back to combustion engines under Donald Trump, while China pulls ahead in electric mobility. A strategic misstep? And: electric ferries in Lagos, transport woes in Karachi and German firms in Serbia.

programme.title: Flamenco, Perestroika And Mishpocha

programme.title: Lured Into War: Russia's Foreign Fighters In Ukraine
programme.desc: Russia is using foreign fighters in its war against Ukraine. Often, they are from poorer countries in Africa, Asia, and Latin America.

programme.title: It's Showtime (Sat)[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Pamilya Talk With Tita Jing S6
programme.desc: Be inspired and learn new things with Tita Jing as she talks about family and life

programme.title: My Puhunan: Kaya Mo!
programme.desc: a magazine program that will be the primary source of information, inspiration, and motivation for Filipinos to change their mindset and be the best version of themselves in order to achieve success in life.

programme.title: Kapamilya Journeys Of Hope With Fr. Tito Caluag
programme.desc: Kapamilya Journeys of Hope with Fr. Tito Caluag reflects on hope and the journey in finding and fulfilling the mission of God for them.

programme.title: The Healing Eucharist[Live]
programme.desc: A weekly TV Mass broadcasted from the ABS-CBN Studios.

programme.title: E8 - Skiing A Couloir
programme.desc: At Lake Louise, Alexis and Thomas attempt to ski a couloir. Before going down, Alexis needs to refine his alpine skiing technique at a resort. It's a chance to discover the history of ski tourism in Canada and its impacts.

programme.title: E18 - Alexis Mabille
programme.desc: The designer Alexis Mabille presents his haute couture collection for the 2023-2024 autumn-winter season, delightfully lightweight and full of joy.

programme.title: E3 - Pelleas And Melisande
programme.desc: Created in 1902 to a libretto by Maurice Maeterlinck, Claude Debussy's only opera ''Pelleas and Melisande'' is composed as a long conversation. Extracts from the 2020 performance of this tragic opera given at the Bordeaux Opera House.

programme.title: E19 - Aquitaine, From Farm To Farm
programme.desc: With its 85,000 farms spread across 84,000 km2, Nouvelle-Aquitaine stands out as an undeniable European agricultural leader. From cereal plains to renowned vineyards and the largest cattle and goat farms in France, the region offers an agricultural landscape of exceptional richness.

programme.title: E14 - Nike Naguy/The Boulaur Sisters/Baie De Somme
programme.desc: Contents: Nike Naguy, a painter inspired by mushrooms; the Cistercian nuns at Abbey of Sainte-Marie de Boulaur; the landscapes of the Bay of the Somme; Don't panic with Caroline.

programme.title: E9 - Luigi La Ferla, Mosaic Artist/Camille Viry, Painter
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: E8 - Skiing A Couloir
programme.desc: At Lake Louise, Alexis and Thomas attempt to ski a couloir. Before going down, Alexis needs to refine his alpine skiing technique at a resort. It's a chance to discover the history of ski tourism in Canada and its impacts.

programme.title: E14 - Nike Naguy/The Boulaur Sisters/Baie De Somme
programme.desc: Contents: Nike Naguy, a painter inspired by mushrooms; the Cistercian nuns at Abbey of Sainte-Marie de Boulaur; the landscapes of the Bay of the Somme; Don't panic with Caroline.

programme.title: E9 - Luigi La Ferla, Mosaic Artist/Camille Viry, Painter
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: E8 - Skiing A Couloir
programme.desc: At Lake Louise, Alexis and Thomas attempt to ski a couloir. Before going down, Alexis needs to refine his alpine skiing technique at a resort. It's a chance to discover the history of ski tourism in Canada and its impacts.

programme.title: E18 - Alexis Mabille
programme.desc: The designer Alexis Mabille presents his haute couture collection for the 2023-2024 autumn-winter season, delightfully lightweight and full of joy.

programme.title: E3 - Pelleas And Melisande
programme.desc: Created in 1902 to a libretto by Maurice Maeterlinck, Claude Debussy's only opera ''Pelleas and Melisande'' is composed as a long conversation. Extracts from the 2020 performance of this tragic opera given at the Bordeaux Opera House.

programme.title: E8 - Paname Plays With Stereotypes
programme.desc: Elegant, romantic, grumpy, always in a hurry: Parisians have quite a reputation. The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have changed the world's perception of the capital-turns out it's not that dirty, and its residents are rather welcoming! Today, which cliches still stick to their skin?

programme.title: E8 - Charming Bivouacs!
programme.desc: With Scarabeo Camp, Belgian Vincent T'sas offers some fantastic escapes: bivouacs in the desert. Also featuring: made-to-measure perfume; auction, a Delvaux in New York; Belgian watches on Monegasque time.

programme.title: E9 - Useful Plants, From Ra'au To The Lab
programme.desc: Over the course of evolution, the plant kingdom has had to adapt. Polynesian plants have developed strategies to feed themselves and to make the most of their environment. A botanical genius that Polynesian healers, the tahu'a, have known how to use in traditional medicine and whose uses are now confirmed by science.

programme.title: L'ocean Vu Du Coeur
programme.desc: Surrounded by experts, scientists, explorers, or simple fishermen, the astrophysicist and ecologist Hubert Reeves, who passed away in 2023, proposes to identify what threatens the ocean today and exposes the latest discoveries on the intelligence of animals and ocean ecosystems.

programme.title: E52 - I Am A Lion
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E1 - Draw A Hippopotamus
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: E15 - French Guiana (Part 1)
programme.desc: Between Suriname and Brazil, French Guiana is the only French department in South America. The adventure begins in Maripasoula, on the Maroni River, with a canoe trip to discover traditional Bushinengue villages. Stops in Papaichton and Belikampo, then Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni, whose history remains marked by the penal colony.

programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E8 - Jerome Ake Beda (Ivory Coast)
programme.desc: Elected best sommelier in Switzerland in 2015, Jerome is the ambassador of Chasselas in the canton of Vaud. Yet he was born far from the vineyards, in Ivory Coast, where he first trained in hospitality. Now settled in the heart of the Leman vineyards, he makes wine a language blending memory and culture.

programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi?

programme.desc: A man living at an extended-stay hotel is shot dead in his room after a night of gambling with friends turns into more than anyone bargained for.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E131 - #DroneBabyDrone
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are excited to try a new online drone delivery service, but when they use it, they encounter more problems than they expected.

programme.title: E112 - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.title: E263 - Who R Zoo? / The Kwarantined Krab
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo made entirely of bubbles! // The Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who carries the mysterious illness.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E416 - Deep Cuts / Game Off
programme.desc: When Luna discovers that the high school music club will be axed due to budget cuts, she leads a protest. // Desperate to play Lincoln's trash-themed video game, Lana conspires to distract her brother away from the console.

programme.title: E625 - Fashion No Show / Doom Service
programme.desc: Leni and Carlota's working styles clash when they are both interning for a famous fashion designer, Mariella Moss. // The Louds book a stay at an all-inclusive resort, only to find the vacation is not what they imagined.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E315 - Smartificial Intelligence / Firehouse Bob
programme.desc: Perch fights for his job after he's fired and replaced by a robot anchorman. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Squidward feel the heat when they become volunteer firefighters.

programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E1 - Sweeping Shores
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.title: E1 - The Young Up-Start
programme.desc: Explore the lush treed cityscape where fluffy male Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop with an iron fist. Then meet Aarav, the old alpha who oversees the wilder Hill Troop. Which will up-and-comer Loci challenge for the crown?

programme.title: E2 - The Grass is Greener
programme.desc: Go on a junk-food-fuelled urban holiday with the Street Troop, then watch the Hill Troop’s invasion of their turf turn sour. Monitor the Sisterhood’s plot to kidnap Sara’s baby before newly minted alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back in town.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: E3 - Jungle River
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: E4 - Tidelands
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E2 - 路演在即全員忘我排練
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: Games Gamblers Play
programme.desc: Teng is the No. 1 con man plus professional gambler in jail. During the jail time, he meets young Liu and the two become friends. Once they get out of jail they team up to make fortune. The two gamblers try their hands at several profitable projects. One day, Liu hits upon a grand plan, but it needs a lot of capital. Therefore he decides to participate in a TV contest so as to win the money...

programme.title: Security Unlimited
programme.desc: Comedy trio the Hui Brothers' produce and star in this hilarious and off the wall laugh-fest and box-office hit, Security Unlimited. Michael Hui stars as head security guard Chou, whose unorthodox, and at times ridiculous approach to training his subordinates doesn't seem to go down well with his boss, Fan (Stanley Fung). Sam (Sam Hui) and Bruce (Ricky Hui) are Chou's favorite targets of abuse, but Chou soon finds the shoe is on the other foot when Ricky gets promoted after saving the day in a botched bank heist.

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Hung is a Kung-fu coach on Lautau Island. His son Lung and his fellow schoolmate, Mao, are considered a couple. One time, Hung's fellow Yan goes to Lautau for help. Lung knows Yan is not a good guy, however, Hung orders Lung to accompany with Yan to develop his career in the city. Yan discovers that Lung is a talented snooker-player and earns much money from gambling. But Lung loses Hung's land to a group of gangsters in game...

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Rising Star -Ho Kai Wa
programme.desc: Ho Kai Wa was first seen for his exceptional dancing skill, yet dancing was only a stepping stone to pursue his dream of becoming an actor. He often brings joy to the audience, but behind the scene he actually bears immense pressure since was overwhelmed by the 'comedic relief' label. Now that he has established himself in the film industry with two films grossed over HK$100 million at the box office. It seems that he has achieved his dream, yet he feels lost and disoriented... In this episode, Kai Wa will shed his on-screen image and talk about his film journey.
